hyperedges.label: Pre-build sync pipeline: sync-drive -> public/koduka + src/data manifests -> Astro build
Content system: collections (koduleht, sermons, contact, site) + Pais header consumer
Homepage section components rendered by index.astro
External data fetched at build time for homepage

nodes.label: Static Site Built with Astro
nodes.rationale: The site is built as a static HTML/CSS/JS site using Astro to avoid server-side logic, making it simple to host on any web server via FTP without runtime dependencies.

nodes.label: Google Drive Image Sync (sync-drive.mjs)
nodes.rationale: Gallery and notice images are pulled from public Google Drive folders at build time, converted to WebP in multiple widths, and manifests are written to src/data/. This avoids storing large images in git.
